project_context.description: Field technician personal assistant analytics dashboard. Data-dense, control room feel.

rules.labels_overlines: text-[10px] md:text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-amber-500 font-bold

surfaces_and_effects.card_base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#27272A] rounded-lg transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_effects.glass_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80 border-b border-[#27272A] sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_effects.button_primary: bg-amber-500 text-[#050505] hover:bg-amber-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs md:text-sm px-4 md:px-6 py-2 rounded transition-all
surfaces_and_effects.button_outline: border border-amber-500/50 text-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-500/10 hover:border-amber-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs md:text-sm px-3 md:px-4 py-2 rounded transition-all

filter_panel.layout: Flex row, wrap, items-end gap-4 p-4 md:p-6 bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#27272A] rounded-lg mb-8
filter_panel.input_fields: bg-[#050505] border border-[#27272A] text-gray-200 text-sm rounded focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 transition-all
filter_panel.labels: text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 mb-1 block

kpi_cards.structure: Top: Icon (lucide-react, text-amber-500) + Label. Middle: Large Value. Bottom: Subtext (e.g. unit/trend, text-gray-500).

recharts.x_axis: <XAxis stroke='#52525B' tick={{ fill: '#9CA3AF', fontSize: 12, fontFamily: 'JetBrains Mono' }} />
recharts.y_axis: <YAxis stroke='#52525B' tick={{ fill: '#9CA3AF', fontSize: 12, fontFamily: 'JetBrains Mono' }} />
recharts.tooltip: <Tooltip contentStyle={{ backgroundColor: '#0A0A0A', border: '1px solid #F59E0B', borderRadius: '4px', color: '#F3F4F6', fontFamily: 'JetBrains Mono' }} itemStyle={{ color: '#F59E0B' }} cursor={{ fill: '#141414' }} />
recharts.line: <Line type='monotone' stroke='#F59E0B' strokeWidth={2} dot={{ fill: '#050505', stroke: '#F59E0B', strokeWidth: 2, r: 4 }} activeDot={{ r: 6, fill: '#F59E0B' }} />

leaflet_map.container_classes: h-[450px] w-full rounded border border-[#27272A] overflow-hidden z-0 relative
leaflet_map.note: Ensure Leaflet CSS is imported. Map container must have z-index strictly managed so modals/dropdowns overlay correctly.

modals.content: fixed top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-full max-w-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-amber-500/50 rounded-lg shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(245,158,11,0.15)] p-6 z-50 flex flex-col gap-4
modals.header: text-xl font-bold text-amber-500 uppercase tracking-widest border-b border-[#27272A] pb-4
modals.close_button: absolute top-4 right-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-amber-500 transition-colors

rankings_and_lists.item: flex justify-between items-center py-3 border-b border-[#27272A] last:border-0 hover:bg-[#141414] transition-colors px-2 rounded
rankings_and_lists.index_badge: text-[10px] text-amber-500 bg-amber-500/10 px-2 py-1 rounded font-bold

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, clickable cards, chart bars) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='export-pdf-button', data-testid='kpi-total-km').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast on hovering over amber buttons remains accessible (use black text on amber).
